pr.title: Depth Recurrence (3+3 x 2 loops) + HW Optimizations

output.summary: Loops 3 encoder + 3 decoder blocks twice with per-loop conditioning to preserve U-Net skips while freeing budget for wider MLPs/BigramHash inside the 16MB cap.
techniques: Depth recurrence (3+3 unique layers looped twice) with per-loop scale/bias conditioning
LRs scaled by 1/sqrt(num_loops) to stabilize shared-weight gradients
Async prefetch, pinned memory, NCCL tweaks, and GPU-resident SWA to boost H100 throughput
